customData.b1-note: Legacy reactive trigger 'onTakeHit'; combat-system.md §12 resolves items on dequeue. This item is authored as an instant effect; B2 to decide whether to keep legacy reactive trigger or convert to an on-commit active item.
customData.b2-note: OQ-35 resolved: reactive `trigger` prop removed. Player must now commit this flask to a sequence slot to heal — it is a standard active consumable. The `healOnBlockBreak` effectId is preserved as an instant heal; the block-break predicate is dropped. Effect registry implementation is up to later effect-authoring passes.
